{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323204609264AAFA5FA0BF3A08473"}"},"total":5753},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7427283343128429337","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是所有四合院类型的书中写的最好看的一本，最好笑的一本。作为一个30多年的老书虫，从来没有看过如此类型的小说，每天看到我笑的肚子疼，值得大力推荐，应该打9.8分以上，建议大家看一看。","text_exts":[{"e":7,"s":4,"text":"四合院","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%9B%9B%E5%90%88%E9%99%A2&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774269969F3A08473%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227427283343128429337%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227391869924202794008%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%9B%9B%E5%90%88%E9%99%A2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1729304596,"group_id":"7391869924202794008","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6tjdsOEABifMdF3NvTE8GQ=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"66737283897","user_name":"一品阁的甄剑"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"66737283897","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1659154079,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7391869924202794008","book_info":{"abstract":"赵羲彦原本是一个小镇做题家，虽然没什么出息，可靠着殷实的家境过得还不错。
可就在一辆呼啸而来的泥头车快要撞到他学生的时候，他下意识的冲了出去，虽然救了学生，却也和泥头车进行了一次亲密且不太友好的接触。
等他再次醒来，已经在一辆驴车上。
而对面，一个明眸皓齿，扎着两个大辫子的姑娘正好奇的看着他。
“你好，我叫秦淮茹……”
“我叫赵羲彦……唔，等等，你说你叫什么？”
　　……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d488ac074aaae243afa6b673a17ef67d","author":"半场开香槟","author_id":"","book_id":"7391869924202794008","book_name":"四合院：快来人，把他嘴缝上","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301808","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"23.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":495,"name":"四合院","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=495&name=四合院&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7391869975624958488","read_count":"238305","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3877348"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"1838","tags":"男频衍生,穿越,四合院,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8c0c0dddb326e2cb1996f7214f570257~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779453969&x-signature=q89d0djrYPItf2cjXMsisbkvAfg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"135981743481448","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"302"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323204609264AAFA5FA0BF3A08473"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读21小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":19,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":35719,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":74050,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":27223},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7398493298004165401","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"逻辑清晰，文笔流畅，主角有灵性，有脑子，不忍不怂，除了部分角色年龄不符合原剧，但为了剧情推进，我是能理解的，其他的都没太大毛病，很不错的小说，四合院中绝对算得上好书。
看到很多人说做的事情，比如私下卖收音机、卖糖果、投机倒把，在那个年代如何如何危险家破人亡之类的，简直是无稽之谈，只能说这些人对年代的理解基于想象。52年，公私合营都还没开始，哪来的投机倒把？再说投机倒把是直到起风时才被认为是阶级矛盾，起风以前其实不严重，甚至三年、跃进时期官方明面上都是允许私人进行数量不大的交易的。
总而言之，在我眼里，这是一本能达到番茄四合院同人文前10%的好书。有特点，有笑点，有爽点，值得一看","text_exts":[{"e":74,"s":71,"text":"四合院","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%9B%9B%E5%90%88%E9%99%A2&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774269969F3A08473%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227398493298004165401%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227391869924202794008%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%9B%9B%E5%90%88%E9%99%A2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1722599184,"group_id":"7391869924202794008","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8REQfY6YS0RvwuFck+TUlIBZ1g4OoEcjnbyUCo2G4zJ","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/aa4ee30016dc42f89df818259562e9be~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796659&x-signature=OR2Etwx04VuBNaQ6P%2FP18yeSB%2Bw%3D","user_id":"4323743881766301","user_name":"吃瓜的Eva"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4323743881766301","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7391869924202794008","book_info":{"abstract":"赵羲彦原本是一个小镇做题家，虽然没什么出息，可靠着殷实的家境过得还不错。
